title: Sunaptea obovata
taxonomy: Sunaptea obovata is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to Australia and is known for its unique characteristics. As a member of the Gentianaceae family, Sunaptea obovata is often classified within the order Gentianales and the clade Asterids. The plant's classification is further detailed within the class Magnoliopsida and the division Magnoliophyta. This classification places Sunaptea obovata within the broader context of flowering plants.
